---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

**Summary**
A concise description of the feature.

**Problem to solve**
Why is this feature needed? Who benefits?

**Proposed solution**
Describe the preferred approach and any non-goals.

**Alternatives considered**
Other options tried or considered.

**Additional context**
Links, mockups, or other context.
